title: prunus × lannesiana f. sericea
intro: Prunus × lannesiana f. sericea, also known as the Sericea Cherry or Silver Cherry, is a plant species in the rose family (Rosaceae). It is a deciduous shrub native to China, known for its ornamental value due to its attractive silver-gray foliage and showy white flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Prunus × lannesiana f. sericea are attributed to its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support digestive health, and it is often prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infusion for medicinal purposes.
